title: Possibility to attach/upload e-mails to conversation updates bubble
excerpt: It would be great to have a chance to upload e-mails into the conversation updates bubble and have them displayed there directly (like a PDF).

posts.author: LeaK (Kehrmann)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great to have a chance to upload e-mails into the conversation updates bubble and have them displayed there directly (like a PDF).
